About this game

ERADICATION

Περάστε μέσα από όλο και πιο σκληρά κύματα και επιβιώστε όσο περισσότερο μπορείτε.

Άνοιγμα παιχνιδιού Τελευταίο update Πίσω στα παιχνίδια
Developer
Low Quality Interactive
Platform
Roblox
Genre
PvE shooter
Status
live

ERADICATION is a team-based territory control shooter on Roblox. Players must work together to push back the Whiskorian invasion and reclaim their town, surviving through escalating enemy waves.

Each match demands coordination and adaptability — the Whiskorians grow stronger as the game progresses, forcing teams to constantly adjust their strategy to survive.

Features

  • Team-based PvE with escalating enemy waves
  • Territory control and defensive mechanics
  • Multiple loadouts and tactical options
  • Regular balance updates and seasonal content

Official links

  • Play on Roblox
  • Latest update notes
Low Quality Interactive

Κάνουμε shipping από το 2024. Τελειώνουμε ποτέ.
